findings.title: Duplicated title-fallback expression across indexing and display layers
findings.suggested_fix: Extract a shared helper `getLessonDisplayTitle(video: { filename?: string; youtubeVideoId?: string; id: string }): string` into `src/lib/searchLabelUtils.ts` that encapsulates the fallback chain `normalizeFilename(video.filename) || video.youtubeVideoId || video.id`. Replace both call sites with the helper. This centralizes the title-resolution policy so changes to fallback priority only touch one location.

residual_risks: Placeholder/description drift: `CommandInput.placeholder` now reads 'Search pages, courses, books, lessons...' while `CommandDialog.description` still says '...notes, highlights, and authors'. This is cosmetic but could confuse users about what is actually searchable.

The `min(60vh, 400px)` clamp on `CommandList` introduces a magic number (400px). The previous value was 300px; the rationale for 400px is undocumented. If the dialog layout changes (e.g., taller header), this cap might need adjustment and the intent is not obvious.
testing_gaps: `normalizeFilename` has unit tests but the fallback chain `normalizeFilename(...) || youtubeVideoId || id` is untested as a policy. A test for `getLessonDisplayTitle` (if extracted) would lock down the fallback priority and prevent drift between the two call sites.
